index_time_rule: Only observations strictly before the loan or assessment index date are eligible.

features.name: income_cv
features.description: Population standard deviation of monthly inflows divided by mean monthly inflows.

features.name: positive_net_flow_ratio
features.description: Share of observed months with positive net cash flow.

features.name: debt_service_ratio
features.description: Average identified monthly debt payments divided by median monthly inflows.

features.name: free_cash_flow_margin
features.description: Average monthly net cash flow divided by median monthly inflows.

features.name: weakest_month_margin
features.description: Weakest monthly net cash flow divided by median monthly inflows.

features.name: minimum_balance_ratio
features.description: Minimum observed balance divided by median monthly inflows.

features.name: balance_buffer_ratio
features.description: Non-negative minimum balance divided by median monthly inflows.

features.name: average_closing_balance_ratio
features.description: Average month-end balance divided by median monthly inflows.

features.name: negative_balance_month_ratio
features.description: Share of observed months whose minimum balance is negative.

features.name: net_flow_volatility_ratio
features.description: Population standard deviation of monthly net cash flow divided by median monthly inflows.

features.name: monthly_balance_trend_ratio
features.description: Average monthly change from first to last closing balance divided by median monthly inflows.
